creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Seems psqlj-7.1.diff.gz was changed after you downloaded the one you
tested with.  Now, the MD5 checksum has to be changed from:

	fc741c179a4088a569266e86bbaae98c

to:

	a4b98390c637dffffdb168a9cdb30ff9


Please confirm.


Regards,
